features: Dryness associated with other connective tissue disease

non_drug: Sipping water frequently all day long
Letting ice melt in the mouth
Avoiding mouth rinses, drinks, and medications containing alcohol
drug: Sodium carboxymethylcellulose 0.5% aqueous solution (OTC); Disp. 8 floz
Saliva stimulants such as sugar-free gum, candy, or mints
adverse_reactions_and_cautions: Patients should be cautioned against using products that contain sugar or have a low pH.
